elements.original_description: A person sitting on a couch with a bored expression, holding a remote control, surrounded by a messy living room with scattered items like magazines and snacks. No text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.
elements.image_prompt: High-quality photograph of a person sitting on a couch with a bored expression, holding a remote control, in a messy living room interior with scattered items like magazines and snacks, illuminated by natural window light, cinematic soft focus with muted tones reflecting a subdued mood.

elements.original_description: A cheerful person walking on a sunny path with green trees and colorful flowers on both sides, holding a water bottle and wearing a hat. No text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.
elements.image_prompt: High-resolution photograph of a cheerful person walking on a sunny outdoor path, surrounded by lush green trees and vibrant colorful flowers, holding a water bottle and wearing a hat, with bright natural sunlight casting warm shadows, sharp focus and soft bokeh background, evoking an uplifting and energetic atmosphere.
